category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a cross assembler targeting Motorola 6809 and Hitachi 6309; official homepage describes asm6809 as a portable cross assembler.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and source_facts.name both use asm6809.
docs_sources: Official asm6809 homepage links the manual in HTML, PDF, and plain text; the HTML manual documents synopsis, options, usage, and expressions.
repo_sources: Official asm6809 homepage gives the git clone URL https://www.6809.org.uk/git/asm6809.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official manual identify 6809/6309 cross-assembly and command-line usage.
